expectations.text: Creates a valid YAML rule file
expectations.evidence: Created rule.yml with id: rxjssubscribe-in-methods, language: TypeScript

expectations.text: The rule uses relational rules (has/inside) or pattern
expectations.evidence: Uses kind: method_definition with has: pattern: $_.subscribe($$$)

expectations.text: Runs ast-grep scan with the rule file
The output correctly identifies subscribe calls in the file
expectations.evidence: Found 2 matches: loadUsers() and deleteUser() methods
